title: Type-2 Diabetes reversal research
summary: Completed deep synthesis of type-2 diabetes reversal/remission research covering definitions, Twin Cycle mechanisms, dietary and surgical interventions, landmark trials (DiRECT, bariatric RCTs, 2025 meta-analyses), success predictors, and durability limits. Created mind map diagram (PNG, SVG, Mermaid source) in session Diagrams folder.
assumptions: Interpreted 'reversal' as clinically defined remission (normalized glycemia without diabetes medications), the standard framing in current research.
Focused on type 2 diabetes only; excluded type 1 diabetes cure/transplant research unless relevant for contrast.
Used general-source literature search per mission brief rather than academic-only mode.
Emphasized established randomized trial evidence (DiRECT, bariatric surgery RCTs, 2025 meta-analyses) over anecdotal or promotional claims.
Assumed informed lay reader wants mechanisms, evidence strength, durability limits, and practical predictors—not prescribing a specific diet protocol.
